seoTitle: Milang vs Mile End — Climate Risk Comparison | ClimateNest
seoDescription: Compare climate risk scores between Milang and Mile End. See which suburb is safer from flood, bushfire, heat, and storm hazards.
ogTitle: Milang vs Mile End: Climate Safety
ogDescription: Data-driven comparison of climate risk in Milang and Mile End.
heading: Milang vs Mile End — Which is Safer?
intro: Compare climate risk between Milang, South Australia and Mile End, South Australia. Our analysis uses data from BOM, CSIRO, and state hazard authorities to score each suburb across 6 climate hazards.
verdict: Mile End has a lower overall climate risk score (34/100) compared to Milang (43/100). We recommend getting an address-level report for properties in both suburbs before making a purchase decision.

faq.question: Is Milang or Mile End safer from flooding?
faq.answer: Milang has a flood risk score of 51/100, while Mile End scores 53/100. A lower score indicates lower flood risk. Get an address-level flood risk report for a specific property.

faq.question: Which suburb has lower bushfire risk?
faq.answer: Milang scores 60/100 for bushfire risk. Mile End scores 27/100. Fire risk depends on proximity to vegetation and local fire history.

faq.question: Should I buy in Milang or Mile End?
faq.answer: Both suburbs have climate considerations. Mile End has a lower overall climate risk score. We recommend getting a full ClimateNest report for any specific property you're considering, which includes 8 hazard scores, insurance projections, and actionable recommendations.

valueImpact.description: Properties in this area may face a 1.95% climate value drag over time due to rising insurance costs and climate adaptation expenses.
